description: Standard release flow: scan the repo, verify the build, tag, push, draft release notes. Uses a chain for the sequential pipeline plus a fan-out for parallel approvals at the gate.
definitionOfDone: All release lanes for "${context}" return GREEN, sentinel and security_sentinel approve, and the release-notes artifact is on disk.

steps.summary: Run npm run verify against the current tree for ${context}
Tag the release candidate for ${context} (no push)
Draft release notes for ${context} from CHANGELOG.md

lanes.name: final-approval
lanes.summary: Sentinel gate on the ${context} release packet
